utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is actually going to be just family .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh ... wait ... you two think of me as family ? ! Oh , I have to ask you something now and be honest ; do you want me to sing Careless Whisper or Lady In Red ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_you two think of me as family ? !
